scripts.test: npm run test -w @crawler/shared && npm run test -w worker
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build -w @crawler/shared && vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:generated: npm run build -w @crawler/shared && vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.ts tests/e2e/generated-graph.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:generated:medium: npm run build -w @crawler/shared && E2E_GRAPH_PAGES=25 vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.ts tests/e2e/generated-graph.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:generated:stress: npm run build -w @crawler/shared && E2E_GRAPH_PAGES=50 vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.ts tests/e2e/generated-graph.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:fixed: npm run build -w @crawler/shared && vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.ts tests/e2e/fixed-fixtures.test.ts
